description: Get dressed in these strappy wedges from catwalk for a wonderful casual look. The multi-coloured straps lend a dose of festivity to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Leather straps in a thong design for a snug Fit Multi-coloured straps for added style Soft synthetic backing for all day comfort Midsole Cushioned synthetic leather covered footbed with stitch detailing for added style Outsole Wedge heels in a weathered pattern for better support TPU outsole with star burst pattern on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the heel for extra grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
